titleStmt.title: SII 40.99: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 99. (A.R. No. B. 79 of 1930.) Tērāla, Palnad Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a slab set up in front of the Siddhēśvara temple in the village.
This is dated Śaka 1366, Rudhirōdgāri, Māgha, ba 14, Monday, Śivarātri, corresponding to 1444 A.D., February 17.
Records the gift of land to the temple of Siddhēśvara at Tēṟala for the merit of the Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Jagannāthadēva-Maharāja by one of his servants (. • Palliyaṟama • .).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śakavarurṣaṁbulu 1366 yēṁṭi ru
durōdgāri saṁvatsara māgha
14 sō śivarātri puṇyakālaṁnāḍu
śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara jaganāthadēva
mahārājulaku puṇyaṁgānu dēvarabaṁṭu ma
palliyaṟamanaḍatēṟala siddhēśvaradēvaraku be
ṭṭina vritti cēnu velipolaṁ varimaḍi kalaṁ ta
ku śrōtriyaṁ kaṭlamu kāsaka gugiḷu tōnu
brōlu sahitaṁgānu Aṣṭabhōgatējasvāmya
ṁgānu dēvaraku puṇyaṁgānu Ācaṁdrārkamu
naḍapaṁgānu yistimi yiṁdukudaku yevaru tapi
konānu gaṁgakaṟutanu gōvu caṁpina dōṣānaku pō
duru svadattā dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattā
nupālanaṁ paradattāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ ni
ṣphalaṁ bhavēt .
Digital edition of SII 40.99 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
